subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty! Though this servant was well aware of thy tribulations and afflictions, and fully apprised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده با وفای جمال ابهی هر چند اینعبد واقف مشقت و بلایای آنجناب بود و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
